name: Jayantasena

sources.label: Shivkumar.org — Vinata Suta Vahana notation (scale explicitly stated)

notes: Janya of Kharaharapriya (22nd melakarta); shadava raga (6 notes ascending and descending, no Rishabha); ārohana S G2 M1 P D2 S, avarohana S N2 D2 P M1 G2 S; a rare raga; best known for Tyagaraja's 'Vinatā Suta Vāhana'
